title: Dashboard
description: The Parthenon Dashboard provides an at-a-glance overview of your OMOP CDM environment. View key metrics across data sources, monitor active jobs, review recent cohort activity, and access CDM characterization data including demographics and observation coverage.
tips: The top metrics bar shows CDM Sources, Active Cohorts, Running Jobs, DQD Failures, and Concept Sets counts.
The CDM Characterization section lets you select a source and view patient counts, median observation duration, total events, data completeness, gender distribution, and age pyramid.
Source Health shows connection status for your top data sources — check this if analyses fail to run.
Active Jobs displays currently running background tasks. Click 'View All' to go to the full Jobs page.
Recent Cohort Activity shows the latest cohort definitions and their generation status.
Quick Actions provide one-click access to common tasks: create cohorts, browse vocabulary, explore data, and run analyses.
